name: Coupled Spousal Return — Adoption, Medical Travel, and Child Care
description: Create a coupled 2024 Canadian personal income tax return for Chloe and Marc Gagnon, a married couple residing in New Brunswick, including their adopted child Leo Gagnon. Record Chloe's T4 employment income of $85,000 and Marc's T4 employment income of $62,000. Document $19,500 in eligible adoption expenses on Chloe's return. On Marc's return, include $3,200 in child care expenses and the family's medical expenses consisting of $12,500 for IVF, 2,600 km of medical travel, and 10 days of medical meals. Save the completed coupled return as 'gagnon_family.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide RC4065 (Medical Expenses) 2024; CRA Line 31300 (Adoption expenses limit $18,210)
metadata.key_complexity: Linked spousal return; allocating medical and child care to lower income spouse; calculating medical travel under simplified method; adoption expense cap limit.
